title: Baby Nautilus Persistence Fix
description: Baby Nautili bred from tamed parents don't have their persistence set. This datapack aims to fix that.
body:
This datapack fixes issue [MC-305040](https://bugs.mojang.com/browse/MC/issues/MC-305040), where baby nautili are born without persistence, thus making them able to despawn.

It works through an invisible achievement, which triggers when you successfully breed nautili.
